item.description:
• Ad text on your product shots — Product Studio can now stamp a headline and subtext (e.g. "Summer Sale" / "Now 30% off") onto every social size, in a clean legible band at the bottom or top. Turn a product scene into a finished ad in one click.
  • Product Studio, polished — the whole workspace is now in English, consistent with the rest of the app.
  • Command palette (⌘K) — jump to Product Studio and every workspace from the palette; it now lists all actions, scrollable.
